title: Maternity leggings
abstract: A revolutionary garment is disclosed that fits precisely to a pregnant woman's evolving body shape. Using a bonded film band instead of traditional seamless shapewear provides superior support, strength and comfort. By adding a bonded front band, the legging has the support of a medical maternity belt with the clean sleek look of a performance legging.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS:  The embodiments of the invention in which an exclusive property or privilege is claimed are defined as follows: 1. An article of clothing comprising: leggings; and, a support band extending around at least a portion of the circumference of the waist and/or abdomen area, wherein the support band is secured to the interior or exterior of the leggings by bonding. 2. The article of clothing of claim 1 wherein the support band comprises a front support panel extending longitudinally across at least a portion of the abdomen and a back support panel extending across at least a portion of the back. 3. The article of clothing of claim 1 wherein the support band extends around the entire circumference of the waist and/or abdomen area. 4. The article of clothing of claim 3, wherein the support bands are comprised of a front support panel and a back support panel that are connected. 5. The article of clothing of claim 4 wherein the back support panel and front support panel are bonded with different films and/or material. 6. The article of clothing of claim 5 wherein the back support panel is less elastic than the front support panel. 7. The article of clothing of claim 1 wherein the leggings is composed of an elastic fabric. 8. An article of clothing comprising: a piece of clothing structured to cover a portion of the waist and/or abdomen area, a support band extending around at least a portion of the circumference of the waist and/or abdomen area, 

 wherein the support band is secured to the interior or exterior of the piece of clothing by bonding. 9. The article of clothing of claim 8 wherein the support band comprises a front support panel extending longitudinally across at least a portion of the abdomen and a back support panel extending across at least a portion of the back. 10. The article of clothing of claim 8 wherein the support band extends around the entire circumference of the waist and/or abdomen area. 11. The article of clothing of claim 10, wherein the support bands are comprised of a front support panel and a back support panel that are connected. 12. The article of clothing of claim 11 wherein the back support panel and front support panel are bonded with different films and/or material. 13. The article of clothing of claim 12 wherein the back support panel is less elastic than the front support panel. 14. The article of clothing of claim 8 wherein the leggings is composed of an elastic fabric. 15. A method of manufacturing an article of clothing comprising the step of: bonding a support band extending around at least a portion of the circumference of the waist and/or abdomen area to the interior or exterior of the article of clothing. 16. The method of claim 15 wherein the article of clothing is leggings. 17. The method of claim 15 wherein the support bands are comprised of a front support panel and a back support panel that are connected. 18. The method of claim 17 wherein the back support panel and front support panel are bonded with different films and/or material. 19. The method of claim 17 wherein the back support panel is less elastic than the front support panel.
